notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac plunked
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Susac hit by pitch. Matt Chapman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Susac grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Bryce Eldridge to 3rd. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Daniel Susac out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Susac rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Susac grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Bryce Eldridge to 3rd. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Daniel Susac out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to pitcher Erik Miller. Kevin Alcántara to 3rd. Kevin Alcántara advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Erik Miller.

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Drew Gilbert out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Drew Gilbert out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.
